name: ads-server-side-tracking
description: Server-side tracking pipeline audit covering server-side Google Tag Manager (sGTM), Meta CAPI Gateway, Conversions API health, event deduplication via event_id, server-side hit ratio targets, pixel debugging, and PII hashing discipline. Use when user says server-side tracking, sGTM, server-side GTM, server-side tagging, CAPI, Conversions API, CAPI Gateway, Meta Conversions API, event deduplication, event_id, pixel debug, pixel health, Pixel/CAPI audit, first-party tracking, iOS 14.5 recovery, or
author: AgriciDaniel
summary_zh: 这是一款服务端追踪审计工具，能帮你排查广告回传链路，解决事件重复、数据丢失及隐私合规痛点，特别适合应对iOS 14.5+导致归因失效或需精细化追踪的场景。
